**Site:** https://metalforge.io/ · **Window:** last 7 days · **Compared against:** 2026-06-24.json

## Classification rules

| Class | Trigger |
| --- | --- |
| **big-loss** | Position worsened ≥3 (with ≥10 prior impr), OR impressions ≤0.5x (with ≥50 prior), OR clicks halved (with ≥4 prior). |
| **disappeared** | Now 0 impressions, had ≥5 clicks or ≥50 impr last week. |
| **ctr-gap-opportunity** | Position 3–10, ≥20 impressions, CTR < 1% — visible but not clicked. **Brann-Dailor-pattern**. |
| **big-win** | Position improved ≥3, OR impressions ≥2x, OR clicks 0→≥1 (with ≥10 impr). |
| **new** | Did not appear last week, ≥5 impressions this week. |
| **null** | Movement within the noise band. |
| **noise** | Below action threshold (e.g. new with <5 impr, gone but had <5 clicks). |
